title: Mizoram PSC – Assistant Professor – 9 Posts

basic_details.job_title: Mizoram PSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Mizoram Public Service Commission (Mizoram PSC) Recruitment 2026 for 9 posts of Assistant Professor (Stage-I). Candidates with Master’s degree, B.E./B.Tech. + M.E./M.Tech, MBA, Ph.D Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 29-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Mizoram PSC official website mpsc.mizoram.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s degree with 55% marks + NET/Ph.D., B.E./B.Tech. + M.E./M.Tech. in relevant branch, MBA/PGDM + 2 years experience

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Mizoram PSC Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: Mizoram Public Service Commission Assistant Professor (Civil Engineering)
